verified_by: local: claude mcp list shows agentmemory connected
notes: MCP servers can expose private data and tools; agent-surface records optional services but does not auto-merge Claude MCP config during install.

verified_by: local: ~/.claude/skills contains optional external skill symlinks
notes: External optional skills are symlinked locally; generated command wrappers remain separate Claude command artifacts.
Use the Codex MCP config path or codex mcp tooling for live MCP changes.

verified_by: local: build target codex renders commands as ~/.agents/skills/<command>/SKILL.md
local: optional external skills are symlinked under ~/.agents/skills
notes: Codex is the canonical generated skill-wrapper target for command sources.
Gemini MCP settings are not merged by agent-surface install because settings.json may contain secrets.

verified_by: local: build target gemini-cli renders command TOML files
notes: No native SKILL.md surface is recorded here; reusable behaviors are distributed as commands/extensions.
Cline supports local stdio servers with command and args; keep auto-approval empty for optional services by default.

verified_by: local: ~/.cline/skills contains optional external skill symlinks
notes: Cline skills are experimental and must be enabled in Cline settings; commands continue to render as workflows.

verified_by: local: @kilocode/sdk Config includes mcp local/remote types
notes: Kilo uses the OpenCode-style mcp object with local command arrays.

verified_by: local: Kilo extension package exposes skill support
local: ~/.kilocode/skills contains optional external skill symlinks
notes: Kilo also uses workflows as its command name; generated command sources remain in the commands/workflows path.
Google Antigravity exposes MCP servers in prompts; local config path is based on observed Antigravity home.

verified_by: local: ~/.gemini/antigravity/skills exists and contains optional external skill symlinks
notes: Antigravity uses workflows as the command name; generated command sources remain under global_workflows.
OpenCode warns MCP servers add context; keep optional MCPs narrow.

verified_by: local: ~/.config/opencode/skills contains optional external skill symlinks
notes: OpenCode also discovers Claude-compatible and agent-compatible skill directories.
VS Code prompts for MCP trust; agent-surface does not auto-write VS Code MCP config.
VS Code agent plugins can bundle skills, commands, agents, hooks, and MCP servers, but agent-surface currently renders instructions and prompts only.
Cursor MCP config may contain secrets and live tool access, so installs do not merge it automatically.

notes: No native SKILL.md surface is recorded here; reusable behaviors are distributed through command/rule surfaces.
Copilot MCP policy can be organization-managed.
Copilot receives generated instruction files today; plugin skills are recorded as future distribution surface.
